steps.assistant_content_head:
I'll create a slide that meets all the specified requirements. Let me build this step by step.

First, I'll create the HTML file with the required structure and styling.

tool_calls.name: write_file
tool_calls.content_head:
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
    <meta charset="UTF-8">
    <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
    <title>Feature Comparison Across Product Tiers</title>

steps.assistant_content_head: Now I'll render the HTML to a PNG to verify if it meets all the requirements.

tool_calls.name: bash
tool_calls.command: python3 -c "from playwright.sync_api import sync_playwright; p=sync_playwright().start(); b=p.chromium.launch(); pg=b.new_page(viewport={'width':1920,'height':1080}); pg.goto('file://' + __import__('o

steps.assistant_content_head: Let me examine the rendered slide to verify if it meets all the requirements.

I can see that the slide has been rendered, but there are several issues that need to be addressed:

1. The column headers are not properly aligned with the bullet points below them
2. The bullet points are not properly positioned under their respective headers
3. The bullet markers are not colored according to the column header colors
4. The layout doesn't properly maintain the 30px gaps between
